channel.title: SOST Protocol Updates
channel.description: Official protocol updates from SOST — Sovereign Stock Token

item.title: cASERT Profile Validation Improvement — Block 5,560
item.description: cASERT equalizer now enforces both ceiling and floor for declared profiles. Block #5525 had a lower-than-expected profile due to incomplete validation. From block 5,560, every block profile must fall within the deterministic range. Anti-stall easing remains supported. Node and miner update required. 123 cASERT tests passing.

item.title: VT Hard Fork — Block 10,000 Activation Package
item.description: Six changes in one coordinated fork: Gold Vault 5-defense governance, Signature-bound PoW (anti-pool), PoPC Model A launch, PoPC Model B escrow on mainnet, version-bit signaling, Bond/Escrow/Capsule activation. Developer custody transitions to protocol custody at block 10,000.

item.title: cASERT H11 Ceiling Activated at Block 5,480
item.description: Equalizer ceiling raised from H10 to H11 (16 of 40 profiles active). Finer-grained lag absorption for persistent 10-block schedule lead. All safety nets active. 118 cASERT tests passing.

item.title: Sovereign Value Stack — Alpha Live on Sepolia
item.description: SOSTEscrow deployed on Sepolia. First PoPC Model B position: 0.5 oz XAUT, 28-day lock. End-to-end settlement and refund paths verified. ED25519 signatures on all trade messages. Position market with full trades and reward-right splits. 375 tests, 0 failures.

item.title: V6++ avg288 bitsQ Controller Active
item.description: Half-life exponential replaced with avg288-based controller at block 5,175. Dynamic cap with dead band. Median removed from consensus at block 5,260.

item.title: V6 Chain Stability Fork at Block 5,000
item.description: Slew rate reduced to +/-1 per block. 40 profiles (E4-H35). Live lag from wall clock. Dynamic lag cap. Anti-stall immediate first drop.

item.title: Genesis Block Mined
item.description: SOST genesis block mined on March 15, 2026 at 18:00:00 UTC. First reward: 7.85100863 SOST split constitutionally 50% miner / 25% Gold Vault / 25% PoPC Pool.
